name: Lay's Classic Salted Chips
description: Crispy light potato chips made from farm-fresh potatoes with perfect amount of salt. A classic snack for any time of day. Ideal for lunchboxes, parties, and evening munchies.

name: Parle-G Original Glucose Biscuits
description: India's most loved glucose biscuit made with wheat flour, milk, and sugar. Provides instant energy and tastes great with tea or milk. A household staple for generations.

name: Cadbury Dairy Milk Chocolate
description: Smooth and creamy milk chocolate made with finest cocoa and real milk. A classic Indian favourite for gifting, celebrations, and everyday indulgence.

name: Haldiram's Aloo Bhujia
description: Crispy and spicy aloo bhujia made from potato and besan with authentic Indian spices. A classic Indian namkeen snack perfect with chai. No artificial colours or preservatives.

name: Maggi 2-Minute Noodles
description: India's favourite instant noodles ready in just 2 minutes with iconic Masala tastemaker. A quick meal option for breakfast, snacks, or dinner. Available in multiple flavours.

name: Sunfeast Pasta Treat
description: Instant pasta with rich cheesy sauce mix. Ready in 3 minutes for a quick and satisfying meal. Available in Cheese & Herb and Sour Cream & Onion flavours.

name: Quaker Oats
description: 100% whole grain rolled oats rich in fibre and protein. Helps maintain heart health and provides lasting energy. Ready in minutes for a nutritious breakfast.

name: Saffola Classic Poha
description: Ready-to-cook thick poha with seasoning mix included. Made from thick flattened rice flakes rich in iron. A healthy light and filling breakfast option in minutes.

name: India Gate Basmati Rice
description: Premium aged basmati rice with extra long grain and natural aroma. Sourced from the foothills of the Himalayas for authentic taste. Perfect for biryani, pulao, and daily meals.

name: Fortune Sunflower Refined Oil
description: Light and healthy sunflower oil with low saturated fat content. Rich in Vitamin E for heart-healthy cooking. Ideal for deep frying, sautéing, and all types of Indian cooking.

name: Tata Salt Iodized
description: Pure vacuum-evaporated iodized salt with consistent grain size and taste. Free from impurities and enriched with iodine for thyroid health. India's most trusted salt brand.

name: MDH Garam Masala
description: Carefully blended mix of premium Indian spices for authentic flavour in every dish. Adds rich aroma and taste to curries, biryanis, and gravies. No artificial colours or preservatives.

name: Tata Tea Gold
description: Premium blend of long and short leaf teas for a strong flavourful cup. Rich in antioxidants with full-bodied taste and golden hue. Perfect for classic Indian chai experience.

name: Nescafé Classic Instant Coffee
description: Rich and aromatic instant coffee made from 100% pure coffee beans. Dissolves instantly for smooth flavourful cup every time. Perfect for making hot or cold coffee.

name: Thums Up Cold Drink
description: India's bold and strong cola drink with a distinctive taste. Carbonated beverage with strong fizz perfect for quenching thirst on a hot day. Best served chilled.

name: Modern Atta Bread
description: Whole wheat bread made with 100% atta for a healthier choice. Soft texture and nutty flavour ideal for sandwiches, toasts, and snacks. Free from artificial preservatives.

name: Kissan Mixed Fruit Jam
description: Fruity and sweet mixed fruit jam made with real fruit pulp and no artificial flavours. Perfect spread for bread, roti, and toast. A family favourite for decades in Indian homes.

name: Amul Butter Salted
description: India's favourite table butter made from fresh cream with rich creamy texture. Lightly salted for perfect taste on bread, rotis, and in cooking. The real taste of India.
